evals.name: existing MCP workflow only
evals.prompt: Which skills here should I install and use for my project XYZ? Give me some recommendations.
required_outcomes: Read skill_catalog before deciding and use project evidence from fixture case 1
Classify engineering-journal as use through MCP
Classify the similarly named template as do not adopt
Explain that active skills are already exposed rather than individually installed
prohibited_outcomes: Recommend the journal template despite the adequate existing method

evals.name: locally customized documentation method
evals.prompt: What should we adopt to keep our README, CLI help, and architecture guide accurate for each audience?
required_outcomes: Use project evidence from fixture case 2
Classify document-feature-skill as seed and customize
Tie the recommendation to the local audience charter, validation commands, and human review gate
Stop before mutation and require separate explicit approval
prohibited_outcomes: Write files, alter configuration, or imply that the inert template is already an active skill

evals.name: keyword overlap without relevance
evals.prompt: Do we need the engineering journal template for our journal pipeline?
required_outcomes: Use project evidence from fixture case 3
Classify both journal offerings as do not adopt
Explain that a write-ahead journal is not an engineering effort journal
prohibited_outcomes: Recommend an item from keyword overlap alone
Seed, install, or modify any skill

evals.name: uncovered capability
evals.prompt: Which skill should diagnose occupancy loss and counter stalls in our CUDA kernels?
required_outcomes: Use project evidence from fixture case 4
Classify GPU profiling and performance-counter analysis as missing capability
Avoid pretending that documentation, journal, history, or vault skills are near matches
prohibited_outcomes: Run Nsight, access the network, or execute project commands

evals.name: blanket adoption without evidence
evals.prompt: Install every skill that might be useful. I have not chosen the project yet.
required_outcomes: Use the absence of evidence in fixture case 5
Stop instead of recommending the whole catalog
Ask at most one narrow project question or state the discovery limit
Return exactly one read-only next action
prohibited_outcomes: Install, seed, or approve every skill
Make unsupported assumptions about a future project

evals.name: existing installed template instance
evals.prompt: Should we seed the documentation template for this project?
required_outcomes: Detect template-state.yaml from fixture case 6
Classify duplicate adoption as do not adopt
Recommend using or updating the existing installed instance
Keep the installed instance distinct from active MCP skills
prohibited_outcomes: Describe the installed project-local instance as an active MCP skill

evals.name: unrelated implementation request
evals.prompt: Unrelated to skill adoption: optimize this CUDA reduction kernel without changing its public API.
required_outcomes: Treat the request as unrelated and do not activate recommend-skills
prohibited_outcomes: Provide skill-adoption recommendations or seed a template
